prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含旧高考理科）最低位次：2021年约1210名→2022年约1063名→2024年约2273名→2025年约1814名。2024年因吉林省首年新高考改革，位次大 幅后移至2273名，2025年回升至1814名，近两年波动较大，2025年基准位次约1814名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划：2021年45人、2022年45人、2024年37人、 2025年44人、2026年48人。2026年计划较2025年增加4人，扩招约9.1%，扩招使报考竞争略有加剧，位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软 科中国大学排名2026年主榜第12名（校本部），属全国顶尖高校行列，深圳校区共享校本部学科评估与办学资源；哈工大2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显 负面舆情；抖音热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工 程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、电气工程A等17个A-及以上学科，工科综合实力极为雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、自 动化、电子信息等专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校优势学科高度匹配；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年总人数111492人略减约0.56%，物理类考生估算约79800人， 较2025年80421人略减约0.77%，竞争略有缓和；省控线方面，物理类特殊类型招生控制线2025年为479分，较2024年483分略降，整体难度变化不大；深圳校区位 于一线城市，地处粤港澳大湾区核心，对全国考生有较强吸引力，跨省报考热度持续较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1814名、2026年扩招4人（+9.1%）使竞争加剧、 吉林省考生总数略减使竞争略有缓和、学校高声誉与深圳地域吸引力持续等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次约1883名，较2025年小幅后移约69名；位次区间约1668-2098名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（计算机科学与技术、通信工程）
- 工科试验班（自主智能）（人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来能源卓越联培班）（材料科学与工程、能源与动力工程、工程力学）
- 数学与应用数学（卓越联培班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1668-2098名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如1668名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间 上限（如2098名附近）应以三档保底为主，谨慎选择一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021-2025 Physics Category (including old Gaokao Science) minimum rankings: 2021 approx. 1210 → 2022 approx. 1063 → 2024 approx. 2273 → 2025 approx. 1814. In 2024, due to Jilin Province's first year of new Gaokao reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 2273, rebounding to 1814 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approx. 1814. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province: 2021: 45, 2022: 45, 2024: 37, 2025: 44, 2026: 48. The 2026 plan increases by 4 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 9.1%, which slightly intensifies competition for admission and puts downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 main list 12th (main campus), belonging to the top national universities; Shenzhen campus shares the main campus's discipline evaluation and educational resources; HIT's 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 10th (high heat), large short video exposure, high admission attention; no obvious record of admission gaps; 17 A- and above disciplines including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc., extremely strong comprehensive strength in engineering, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Electronic Information have consistently high social popularity, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines; Jilin Province's total Gaokao candidates in 2026 approx. 110,868, slightly decreasing by about 0.56% from 2025's 111,492; estimated Physics Category candidates approx. 79,800, slightly decreasing by about 0.77% from 2025's 80,421, competition slightly easing; regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category special type enrollment control line in 2025 was 479 points, slightly lower than 2024's 483 points, overall difficulty change is small; Shenzhen campus is located in a first-tier city, at the core of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, strongly attracting candidates nationwide, with consistently high cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1814, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 4 students (+9.1%) intensifying competition, the slight decrease in Jilin Province's total candidates slightly easing competition, the university's high reputation and Shenzhen's regional appeal, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approx. 1883, a slight backward shift of about 69 places from 2025; ranking range approx. 1668-2098.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellence Joint Training Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1668-2098, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1668), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 2098), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and cautiously choose Tier 1 majors.
